title: Humint
tmdbOverview: A South Korean agent hunts a drug ring in Russia and goes head-to-head with a North Korean operative — pulling both into peril and tangled secrets.
synopsis: Humint (2026) is a thriller, action and drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a +16 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
